title: Mobile Hover Bug Fixed for Smooth Interactions

topics.title: Community Engagement and Contributions
topics.summary: A notable increase in community contributions has been reported, with 280 contributors engaging with the npmx repository over 100 days. The use of Bluesky for social communications has played a significant role in attracting contributors, showcasing the platform's effectiveness for open-source projects.

topics.title: User Interface Improvements
topics.summary: Recent updates have focused on enhancing user interface elements, particularly for touch devices. A merged pull request improved toggle transitions, addressing hover effects that were problematic on mobile. This change aims to provide a smoother user experience across different devices.

topics.title: Bug Fixes for Mobile Interactions
topics.summary: An issue regarding sticky hover styles on mobile switches has been closed, indicating that the problem was acknowledged and resolved. This bug was specific to certain devices and configurations, highlighting the importance of thorough testing across platforms.
